LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 22, 2012 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 608. THE COURT IS UNABLE TO APPROVE THE SETTLEMENT AT THIS TIME. THE EVIDENTIARY BASIS FOR THE ATTORNEYS FEES CLAIMED IS INSUFFICIENT. THE CLAIMS REGARDING ACTUAL FEES INCURRED (OVER $50,000) ARE EXORBITANT. THE COURT TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-19-2012 Vacated
Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Approve Prop 65 Settlement

Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Approve Prop 65 Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Continued To Aug-22-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 608
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Clifford Chanler, Esq. and Josh Voorhees, Esq. of the Chanler Group, Tel. 510.848.8850, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party;
William L. Troutman, Esq. of Fulbright & Jaworski, Tel. 213.892.9208, appearing for defendant Hot Topic Inc, via court call;
Harrison Pollak, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, Tel. 510.622.2183, objector.

The matter was argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling as modified: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement is continued to August 22, 2012 at 9:00 AM in Department 608. The court is unable to approve the settlement at this time. The evidentiary basis for the attorneys fees claimed is insufficient. The claims regarding actual fees incurred (over $50,000) are exorbitant. The court to prepare order. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2011 Set For Trial On Nov-05-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2011 Continued To Jan-13-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
